---
name: 📝 Documentation issue
about: Inaccuracy, typo, or missing info in the docs
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: ['type:docs', 'status:triage']
assignees: []
---

## What is wrong with the docs?

- [ ] Typo
- [ ] Outdated info (e.g. references old version, broken link)
- [ ] Missing information / unclear
- [ ] Inaccurate code example
- [ ] Bad English / grammar
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Where is the issue?

- File path: `path/to/file.md` (e.g. `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`)
- Section / line: (if you can identify it)

## What should it say instead?

If you have a suggested wording, share it here. (No need to be perfect — just give us the idea.)

## Related

- Issue / PR that introduced the inaccuracy (if known):
